title: Carnival Extends Time For Equity Offering
text: Carnival Corp (NYSE: CCL) has extended its share purchase program until April 30, 2022, under the same terms, from the previous date of January 31, 2022. The company had offered to sell shares of its common stock through its agent BofA Securities, having an aggregate offering price of up to $500 million.

title: Carnival files for 'at-the-market' offering of up to $500 million worth of shares
text: The U.S.-listed shares of Carnival Corp. CCL, -0.73% CCL, +0.99% dropped 1.6% in premarket trading Monday, after the cruise operator said it filed for the sale of up to $500 million worth of its common stock, in an "at-the-market" offering. As previously announced, the company said it plans to use the proceeds from the offering to buy Carnival PLC ordinary shares and for general corporate purposes.
